'''sasate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:early|early]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-s-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:early|early]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sasate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:sasate|sasate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sasatesher|sasatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sasatesherĂ«m|sasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sasatero|sasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sasateshĂ«|sasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sasateshĂ«m|sasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisasatero|gokisasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisasateshĂ«|gokisasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisasateshĂ«m|gokisasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosasankerom|gosasankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosasankeshĂ«|gosasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosasankeshĂ«m|gosasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosasankeya|gosasankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sasaterom|sasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sasatemu|sasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sasateya|sasateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisasaterom|gokisasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisasatemu|gokisasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisasateya|gokisasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:sasasate|sasasate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sasasatesher|sasasatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sasasatesherĂ«m|sasasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sasasatero|sasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sasasateshĂ«|sasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sasasateshĂ«m|sasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisasasatero|gokisasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisasasateshĂ«|gokisasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisasasateshĂ«m|gokisasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosasasankerom|gosasasankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosasasankeshĂ«|gosasasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosasasankeshĂ«m|gosasasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosasasankeya|gosasasankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sasasaterom|sasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sasasatemu|sasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sasasateya|sasasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisasasaterom|gokisasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisasasatemu|gokisasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisasasateya|gokisasasateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠsĂŠte|sĂŠsĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠsĂŠtesher|sĂŠsĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠsĂŠtero|sĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠsĂŠtero|gokisĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠsĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠsĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠsĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠsĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠsĂŠterom|sĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠsĂŠtemu|sĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠsĂŠteya|sĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠsĂŠterom|gokisĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠsĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠsĂŠteya|gokisĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:safsafte|safsafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safsaftesher|safsaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safsaftesherĂ«m|safsaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safsaftero|safsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safsafteshĂ«|safsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safsafteshĂ«m|safsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafsaftero|gokisafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafsafteshĂ«|gokisafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafsafteshĂ«m|gokisafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafsafnkerom|gosafsafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafsafnkeshĂ«|gosafsafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafsafnkeshĂ«m|gosafsafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafsafnkeya|gosafsafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safsafterom|safsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safsaftemu|safsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safsafteya|safsafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafsafterom|gokisafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafsaftemu|gokisafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafsafteya|gokisafsafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
